text.title: value-proposition-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for value-proposition-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Building the canvas around features instead of customer jobs, pains, and gains.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The canvas becomes a product datasheet. Without customer-first framing, you miss what customers actually care about and build a feature list instead of value prop.

failure-mode.description: Creating one generic value prop that "works for everyone."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: One value prop per segment. Positioning that fits everyone fits no one. Explicit audience segmentation allows targeted positioning per segment.

failure-mode.description: Designing pain relievers and gain creators without research data on customer problems and desires.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The canvas becomes fiction. Every entry must cite interview data or JTBD research. Agents guessing pains produce plausible-sounding but untested hypotheses.

failure-mode.description: Leading with the product category or feature in the value prop ("AI-powered platform," "blockchain-based solution").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Customers don't buy categories or technologies; they buy outcomes. Feature-led copy reads as marketing jargon, not value.

failure-mode.description: Equating "Unlike X" with a real differentiator ("more user-friendly," "better support").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Weak differentiators. Every product claims to be user-friendly. Differentiators must be measurable, specific, and hard to copy ("flat pricing regardless of scale," "offline-first sync").

failure-mode.description: Refreshing the value prop once and leaving it static.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Markets move. Yesterday's differentiator becomes table stakes. Quarterly refresh keeps positioning sharp; annual refresh is minimum discipline.
